name: A T M Hasan
headline: AI Engineer | AI Researcher | Senior Software Engineer | Java Software Engineer
summary: AI Researcher and Senior Software Engineer based in Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, with 12+ years of experience in Java enterprise applications, Spring Boot, microservices, REST APIs, databases, and production engineering. Current work combines privacy-preserving RAG and document intelligence with reliable backend systems. Experienced in team leadership, API integration, SQL optimization, Agile delivery, and enterprise software support.
